summary: All systems operational. Live app and Supabase backend are up. No secrets or data leaks. 2 low-severity code-quality advisories to review when convenient.

liveSite.note: The banner runs a live uptime ping on every page load. This deeper check (app HTML + Supabase health) ran now and is recorded weekly on Mondays.

findings.title: No service-role or secret keys in client code
findings.detail: Scanned for secret keys, service_role, private keys, and AWS/Stripe/GitHub tokens. None present.

findings.title: Only the browser-safe publishable key is shipped
findings.detail: The publishable key is designed to be public; access is gated by Supabase RLS + SECURITY DEFINER RPCs.

findings.title: No debug logging of user data
findings.detail: 3 console.warn calls found, all error-handling only — no PII printed.

findings.title: Guest/plan data stored in browser localStorage (by design)
findings.detail: 8 localStorage uses power local-only mode. Expected; data stays on the user's device.

findings.title: 23 empty / swallowed catch blocks
findings.detail: Errors are caught and silently ignored. Fine for non-critical paths, but can hide real failures (e.g. failed cloud saves). Consider logging or surfacing the important ones.

findings.title: 63 innerHTML assignments — keep user text escaped
findings.detail: innerHTML is an XSS surface. Confirm guest names, RSVP notes, and any user-entered text are escaped before insertion. SVG/template literals with static content are safe.

findings.title: JavaScript syntax valid
findings.detail: node --check passed on all inline scripts.

findings.title: Cloud sync RPCs present
findings.detail: wp_signup, wp_load, wp_save, wp_admin_list all referenced.

findings.title: Planner modules present & rendering live
findings.detail: checklist, budget, guest list, RSVP, countdown, themes, vendors, and guest portal all detected in code and confirmed rendering on the live site.
